name: Crashpad
description: Chromiums crash-reporting system — library for capturing, storing, and transmitting minidumps on macOS, Windows, Linux.

seo.title: Crashpad — Crash Reporting
seo.meta_description: Crashpad: Chromiums crash-reporting system — library for capturing, storing, and transmitting minidumps on macOS, Windows, Linux.

when_to_use: Crash dump capture and minidump transmission for C++ applications
Integrating Chromium-based crash reporting into desktop or embedded apps
Out-of-process crash handler for macOS, Windows, and Linux native apps
Custom crash reporting pipeline using open-source Crashpad library

pros: Battle-tested in Chrome across macOS, Windows, Linux
Handles minidump capture and transmission reliably
Open source and widely integrated by Sentry, Firefox
Low-level building block you can trust
cons: Library, not a backend or UI
You still need a server to receive crashes
review.verdict: Default native crash capture plumbing; pair with Sentry, Backtrace or your own backend to see the data.
review.best_for: Native apps needing proven minidump capture across OSes
review.not_for: Teams wanting a turnkey crash reporting product
